# Asurada System Check

- [x] Explore codebase to identify system components and "Asurada" references <!-- id: 0 -->
- [x] Identify host address and port <!-- id: 1 -->
- [x] Check system status (health check) <!-- id: 2 -->
- [x] Verify host accessibility via browser (Network verified; Visual check unavailable) <!-- id: 3 -->

# Browser Environment Fix

- [x] Check `HOME` environment variable <!-- id: 4 -->
- [x] Set `HOME` variable <!-- id: 5 -->
- [/] Verify browser launch (Requires restart) <!-- id: 6 -->
